title: Velocity 2X
notes: All text is missing in game, attempting to blindly start a level results in a hard freeze.

title: Velocity 2X
notes:
Game speed is uncapped, on my system it runs at around 6x normal speed.
May be perfectly playable on a slower system or if artificially slowed down.
Can randomly crash in level select, but this bug is present in Windows as well.

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 2400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Didn't have to do any controller configuration in the menu that pops up before the game starts, even though it only listed keyboard mappings. When the game started, the controller worked fine. Game plays at normal speed, and the framerate is acceptable.
